_comment: Record 1 — VALID. Effective control test, no deficiency — only mandatory base fields required.
control_objective: Ensure revenue is recognised in the correct period in accordance with IFRS 15 / ASC 606 and that cut-off errors are detected before close.

_comment: Record 2 — VALID. Ineffective control with control_deficiency classification — remediation_target_date included to satisfy the date_format rule (conditioned on test_result=ineffective).
control_objective: Verify that purchase orders, goods receipts, and invoices match before payment is approved, preventing duplicate and fraudulent payments.

_comment: Record 3 — VALID. Material weakness — all required cascading fields present: remediation_plan, remediation_target_date, remediation_owner, escalated_to_audit_committee.
control_name: IT General Controls — User Access Reviews
control_objective: Ensure quarterly user access reviews are performed for all financially significant systems to prevent unauthorised access to financial data.
remediation_plan: Implement automated quarterly access review workflow in IAM platform. Assign dedicated access review coordinator. Interim manual review to be completed by 2026-02-28.

_comment: Record 4 — INVALID. test_result is 'ineffective' but deficiency_classification is missing — required_if rule violated. control_category is 'it_general_controls' which is not in the COSO lookup.
control_objective: Ensure all changes to financially significant systems are properly approved, tested, and authorised before being moved to production.

_comment: Record 5 — INVALID. deficiency_classification is 'significant_deficiency' but remediation_plan, remediation_target_date, and remediation_owner are all missing — required_if rules violated.
control_objective: Ensure all manual journal entries above the materiality threshold are reviewed and approved by a second authorised individual.

_comment: Record 6 — INVALID. financial_assertion is 'accuracy' which is not in the allowed PCAOB lookup. test_type is 'walkthrough' which is not in the allowed lookup (inquiry, observation, inspection_of_documents, reperformance).
control_objective: Ensure all bank accounts are reconciled monthly and reconciling items are investigated and resolved within 30 days.
